Stick.description: It's just a stick. Hard to use and not very strong.

Wrench.description: A heavy wrench. Hits harder than a stick.

Sword.description: Metal single-edged longsword with a sharp blade.

Shock Rod.description: An electrified rod that delivers a shocking blow. Zap!

Lightsabre.description: A laser sword. Very expensive! Bzzzzt.

Shotgun Shell.description: Allows you to fire a Shotgun weapon once. Consumed when fired.

Cardboard Armor.description: Cheapest possible armor for a robot. Even a stick could break it.

Wooden Armor.description: This armor was a tree once. The lorax disapproves.

Fourth Arm.description: Even more arms, even more weapons

Fifth Arm.description: This is just silly. Who needs 5 arms?

Gold Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to defend itself. Protect the face!

Small Computer Chip.description: A computer chip that teaches the robot how to dodge. If you can dodge a wrench...

Power Chip.description: A computer chip that boosts attack power. Your attacks deal 10% more damage!

Money Maker.description: Earn more money from winning. It takes money to make money!

Propeller.description: A spinning propeller that helps the robot dodge attacks.

Small Battery.description: A small battery that increases energy capacity.

Medium Battery.description: A medium battery that increases energy capacity.

Big Battery.description: A big battery that increases energy capacity.

Repair Kit.description: Repairs the robot. Can even leave it stronger than it started (for one battle).

Grenade.description: A small bomb you can launch at the enemy.

Throwing Net.description: It's a net. You throw it. Destroys the net.
